PowerShell(python -c "import pypdf; r=pypdf.PdfReader\(r'$env:TEMP\\ppc_eca_itabira.pdf'\);`nout=open\(r'$env:TEMP\\ppc_componentes.txt','w',encoding='utf-8'\)`nfor i in range\(77,87\):`n    out.write\('==== PAGE %d ====\\n'%i + \(r.pages[i].extract_text\(\) or ''\) + '\\n'\)`nout.close\(\); print\('ok'\)")

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sigaa.unifei.edu.br/sigaa/verProducao?idProducao=300374&key=141943bcb68f528c7b6818fb8870edcd" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\ppc_eca_antigo.pdf"; \(Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\ppc_eca_antigo.pdf"\).Length; python -c "import pypdf; r=pypdf.PdfReader\(r'$env:TEMP\\ppc_eca_antigo.pdf'\); print\(len\(r.pages\)\); print\(\(r.pages[0].extract_text\(\) or ''\)[:300]\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import pypdf,re; r=pypdf.PdfReader\(r'$env:TEMP\\ppc_eca_antigo.pdf'\);`nfor i,p in enumerate\(r.pages\):`n    t=p.extract_text\(\) or ''`n    if re.search\(r'\(Matriz|Estrutura\) [Cc]urricular', t\) or 'Período' in t and \('Código' in t or 'C.H.' in t or 'CHT' in t\): print\(i, t[:90].replace\('\\n',' | '\)\)")

PowerShell(python -X utf8 -c "import pypdf,re; r=pypdf.PdfReader\(r'$env:TEMP\\ppc_eca_antigo.pdf'\);`nout=open\(r'$env:TEMP\\ppc2018_hits.txt','w',encoding='utf-8'\)`nfor i,p in enumerate\(r.pages\):`n    t=p.extract_text\(\) or ''`n    if re.search\(r'\(Matriz|Estrutura\) [Cc]urricular', t\) or \('Período' in t and \('Código' in t or 'C.H.' in t or 'CHT' in t\)\): out.write\(str\(i\)+' :: '+t[:100].replace\(chr\(10\),' | '\)+chr\(10\)\)`nout.close\(\); print\('done'\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Directory | Where-Object {$_.Name -notin @\('.claude','Estágio','Estrutura','Prompts de extração','utilidade','Awsales Agentes'\)} | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \('### ' + $_.Name\); Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \('  - ' + $_.Name\) } })
